PreceptDef.label: hated
PreceptDef.description: Trees invite insects and pests, and those bring diseases. Purging the world of their danger is our duty.

li.label: massive trees
li.description: I am surrounded by several massive, terrifying trees. What kind of dangers lurk within!

li.label: amazing tree
li.description: I very recently encountered a massive, terrifying tree!

li.label: unsettling forest
li.description: I am surrounded by a lush forest.

li.label: massive tree
li.description: I recently encountered a massive, terrifying tree.

li.label: rich forest
li.description: I was recently surrounded by a lush forest.

li.label: full trees
li.description: I recently walked among many full trees.

li.label: mixed trees
li.description: I recently walked among a wide variety of trees.

li.label: full tree
li.description: I recently encountered a full tree.

li.label: mini trees
li.description: I was recently surrounded by plenty of miniature trees.

li.label: mini tree
li.description: I recently encountered a miniature tree.

li.label: no tree
li.description: I haven't had to deal with trees and their pests in a while.

li.label: no tree
li.description: I haven't had to deal with trees and their pests in a while.

li.label: trees gone
li.description: It has been a while since I've been near a tree.

li.label: trees gone
li.description: It has been a long time since I've been near a tree.

li.label: barren land
li.description: It's been so long since I've had to be around a tree!

li.label: healthy trees
li.description: In the past quadrum, we didn't destroy many trees at all. Let's hope we don't suffer for our negligence.

li.label: trees disturbed
li.description: In the past quadrum, we have destroyed a few trees.

li.label: trees defaced
li.description: In the past quadrum, we have destroyed a lot of trees.

li.label: trees damaged
li.description: In the past quadrum, we have destroyed many trees.

li.label: trees harmed
li.description: In the past quadrum, we have destroyed an decent number of trees.

li.label: trees defiled
li.description: In the past quadrum, we have destroyed a large number of trees.

li.label: trees wrecked
li.description: In the past quadrum, we have destroyed a very large number of trees. I can hear the leafy screams even now.

li.label: trees ravaged
li.description: In the past quadrum, we have destroyed an unbelievable number of trees. We are purging this forest no matter how much it fights us.

PreceptDef.label: never
PreceptDef.description: To force your beliefs on another is an unforgivable act.

PreceptDef.label: rare
PreceptDef.description: To force your beliefs on another should only be done in very special circumstances.

PreceptDef.label: hated
PreceptDef.description: We must grow crops frequently, and avoid raising large animals.

li.label: no animals
li.description: We have no animals at all! I have so much free time to spend on farming.

li.label: scarce animals
li.description: We have very few animals in our colony. This will give us time to focus on what truly matters.

li.label: few animals
li.description: We have few animals in our colony. It's alright.

li.label: some animals
li.description: It's bad to be raising animals here, so we should try removing some of them.

li.label: lots of animals
li.description: It's horrible we're raising lots of animals here, and we should look at letting some of them go.

li.label: tons of animals
li.description: Our ranch is thriving. Why do we let this distraction remain.

li.label: sowed human food plant
li.description: I sowed a plant. This allows us to truly connect with nature.

PreceptDef.label: approved
PreceptDef.description: We must use machines to guard ourselves. Limiting ourselves to fleshy protectors will only lead to ruin.

li.description: Automated weapon in colony

li.label: automated weapons
li.description: We use automated weapons. I feel safer with their constant protection.

PreceptDef.label: required
PreceptDef.description: Humans must shed their weak flesh to become one step closer to the machine. There is no constancy in flesh, only decay.

li.label: no artificial enhancement
li.description: I don't have any artificial body enhancements. There is no strength in flesh, only weakness.

li.label: transhumanist modded
li.description: This artificial enhancement matches my belief.

li.label: transhumanist connected
li.description: The more artificial enhancements I get, the stronger my expression of my beliefs.

li.label: transhumanist enhanced
li.description: My connection to my belief is increased by my third artificial enhancement. But I could use more.

li.label: transhumanist synchronized
li.description: Only two more artificial enhancements are required to fully synchronize with my beliefs.

li.label: transhumanist integrated
li.description: Five artificial enhancements! I'm beginning to feel perfect integration with my beliefs.

li.label: transhumanist transformed
li.description: It's as though I've left the weak flesh behind.

li.label: transhumanist evolved
li.description: The metal allows me to surpass my biological limitations.

li.label: transhumanist ascendance
li.description: My beliefs grow stronger as the flesh fades.

li.label: transhumanist transcendence
li.description: The truth of the world is clearer to me than ever before.

li.label: transhumanist pinacle
li.description: Even the memory of the weak flesh from before is fading.
